name: Pasta with Ricotta and Parsley
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound Pasta (Shells, Elbows, Or Other Small Forms)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onions, garlic and green pepper in the oil until lightly browned, stirring frequently. Add the parsley, salt, pepper and oregano; cook, stirring, until the parsley is wilted but not brown.
2. Stir in the sour cream and mix well. Stir in the ricotta cheese and warm through without simmering to prevent curdling.
3. Cook pasta until al dente, then drain thoroughly. Return the pasta to the pot and add the sauce. Toss until combined. Adjust seasonings as needed and serve on a hot platter.
